summary: Frontend testing completed for Property Management System - Authentication, navigation, and dashboard working well, but critical CRUD operation failures found in owner/tenant creation

critical_bugs.issue: Owner creation fails with 'Failed to save owner' error despite form being correctly filled
critical_bugs.details: Form opens, accepts input, but submission fails. Error toast shows 'Failed to save owner'. Backend API call likely failing.

integration_issues.issue: Owner creation API integration failing - form submission not completing successfully
integration_issues.details: Frontend form correctly formatted and filled, but API call results in error toast message

integration_issues.issue: Authentication sessions expire frequently requiring repeated logins
integration_issues.impact: Poor user experience with frequent re-authentication needed

passed_tests: User Login - authentication working with correct credentials
Dashboard Loading - stats cards display correctly (6 cards present)
Dashboard Data - real data showing (tenants: 1, owners: 1, agreements: 1, notices: 1)
Navigation Sidebar - all menu items present and accessible
Owners Page - loads and displays existing owners list (2 owners visible)
Owner Form - modal opens and accepts input for all fields
Owner Data Persistence - previously created 'Robert Johnson' persists in list
Frontend UI/UX - proper styling, modals, forms, buttons render correctly
Error Handling - error messages display properly via toast notifications

success_percentage.frontend: 70% (7/10 core features working - UI excellent, CRUD operations failing)

critical_fixes_required: Fix owner creation API integration - form submits but fails with 'Failed to save owner' error
Debug why backend API calls from frontend are failing despite backend tests passing 100%
Investigate tenant creation functionality (requires working owner creation first)
Check authentication token handling - sessions expire frequently
Verify API request formatting from frontend matches backend expectations
action_item_for_main_agent.testing_notes: Frontend UI is well-built and functional. Dashboard, navigation, authentication all working properly. The main issue is CRUD operations failing at the API integration level. Backend APIs tested 100% successful in isolation, so this appears to be a frontend-to-backend communication issue.
